gate0.source_grade_rationale: Reuters is a primary newswire on the approved list.

generic_media_reason: None of the 6 categories matched - official RBI policy action with a precise 50 bps cut, exact new rate, and named vote count, not a roundup/index-summary/gainers-losers/undifferentiated multi-company piece.

routing_reason: Materiality 84 >= 70: an off-cycle 50 bps policy rate cut mechanically reprices funding costs across rate-sensitive sectors.
